user.title: Select HomeKit Bridges
user.description: Select one or more HomeKit Bridges to manage. Found {bridge_count} available bridge(s).

bridge.title: Configure {bridge_name}
bridge.description: Step {current_index} of {bridge_total}. Choose which Home Assistant Areas to include and optionally override the entity list with include/exclude IDs (comma or newline separated).

abort.no_bridges: No HomeKit Bridge configurations found. Please set up the HomeKit Bridge integration first.
abort.all_bridges_configured: All available HomeKit Bridges have already been configured.

error.invalid_bridge: The selected bridge is not valid or no longer exists.
error.select_bridge: Select at least one bridge to continue.

init.title: Select Bridges to Manage
init.description: Update which HomeKit Bridges this entry manages. Existing bridge-specific filters will be requested next.

bridge.title: Update {bridge_name}
bridge.description: Step {current_index} of {bridge_total}. Adjust areas and include/exclude overrides.
